chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–623 of 2023 [Mohammad Farid Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui C.J. Mr. Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Hearing of case: 1. For order on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.10.2024 Mr. Shah Imroz Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. Ch. Muhammad Farooq, Deputy Director NADRA. Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The parawise comments suggest that the petitioner may contact the Consulate General Jeddah for the renewal of his passport. If there is no other impediment, the authority shall ensure its early and smooth transition of the removal. The petition stands disposed of. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
